name: create_pod
description: Create a new modular portable database pod. Pods store notes, documents, and embeddings locally in SQLite. Types: scholar (research), health (biometrics), projects (workspace), shared (group).

name.description: Name for the new pod (no spaces, use underscores)

pod_type.description: Type of pod: scholar, health, shared, or projects

name: list_pods
description: List all available data pods. Shows pod name, type, and creation date. Use this to see what pods exist before adding content or querying.

name: add_note
description: Add a text note to an existing data pod. Supports title, content, and tags for organization. Notes are stored in local SQLite database.

pod_name.description: Name of the pod to add the note to

tags.description: Comma-separated tags for organization (e.g., 'ai, research, notes')

name: query_pod
description: Search notes in a data pod. Supports text search (keywords) and raw SQL queries. Text search looks for matches in title and content.

pod_name.description: Name of the pod to query

text.description: Text to search for in notes (title and content)

name: export_pod
description: Export a data pod as a ZIP file for sharing or backup. Creates a portable .vpod file containing SQLite database, metadata, and manifest.

pod_name.description: Name of the pod to export

name: ingest_folder
description: Ingest documents from a folder into a data pod. Supports PDF, TXT, MD, DOCX, PNG, JPG. Automatically extracts text, chunks content, and generates embeddings for semantic search. Requires: PyPDF2, python-docx, Pillow, pytesseract, sentence-transformers

pod_name.description: Name of the pod to ingest documents into

folder_path.description: Path to folder containing documents to ingest

name: semantic_search
description: Perform semantic search across ingested documents in a pod. Uses embeddings to find semantically similar content. Requires sentence-transformers to be installed.

pod_name.description: Name of the pod to search

name: list_documents
description: List all documents ingested into a data pod. Shows filename, type, hash, and creation date.

name: consent_grant
description: Grant an agent access to specified pods. Creates a consent session with optional expiration. Agents must have valid consent to access pod data.

pods.description: List of pod names to grant access to

agent.description: Agent name to grant access to

name: consent_revoke
description: Revoke an agent's access to pods by session ID. Immediately terminates the consent session.

name: consent_status
description: Show consent status for all sessions or a specific session. Displays active sessions, agent names, allowed pods, and expiration times.
